zh.Monmouth, Monmouthshire, Wales, United K: 英國威爾斯蒙姆爾蒙姆斯
zh.lifeSummary: 當Lord John de Monmouth於1182年出生在威爾士蒙姆爾蒙姆斯時，他的父親Gilbert fitzBaderon de Monmouth43歲，母親Mrs Gilbert fitzBaderon de Monmouth43歲。他於1200年與Lady Maud de Huntington在英國威爾斯蒙姆爾蒙姆斯結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。他去世於大約1248年在英國威爾斯蒙姆爾享年67歲，埋葬在威爾士蒙姆爾蒙姆斯。

zh-hans.Monmouth, Monmouthshire, Wales, United K: 英国威尔斯蒙姆爾蒙姆斯
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lord John de Monmouth于1182年出生在威尔士蒙姆爾蒙姆斯时，他的父亲Gilbert fitzBaderon de Monmouth43岁，母亲Mrs Gilbert fitzBaderon de Monmouth43岁。他于1200年与Lady Maud de Huntington在英国威尔斯蒙姆爾蒙姆斯结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。他去世于大约1248年在英国威尔斯蒙姆爾享年67岁，埋葬在威尔士蒙姆爾蒙姆斯。

meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Monmouth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Lord John de Monmouth was born in 1182, in Monmouth, Monmouthshire, Wales, his father, Gilbert fitzBaderon de Monmouth, was 43 and his mother, Mrs Gilbert fitzBaderon de Monmouth, was 43. He married Lady Maud de Huntington in 1200, in Monmouth, Monmouthshire, Wales, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. He died about 1248, in Monmouthshire, Wales, United Kingdom, at the age of 67, and was buried in Monmouth, Monmouthshire, Wales.

fr.Monmouth, Monmouthshire, Wales, United K: Monmouth, Monmouthshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lord John de Monmouth est né en 1182, à Monmouth, Monmouthshire, Galles, son père, Gilbert fitzBaderon de Monmouth, avait 43 ans et sa mère, Mrs Gilbert fitzBaderon de Monmouth, avait 43 ans. Il a épousé Lady Maud de Huntington en 1200, à Monmouth, Monmouthshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Il est décédé environ 1248, à Monmouthshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 67 ans, et a été enterré à Monmouth, Monmouthshire, Galles.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lord John de Monmouth 1182 in Monmouth, Monmouthshire, Wales geboren wurde, war sein Vater Gilbert fitzBaderon de Monmouth 43 und seine Mutter Mrs Gilbert fitzBaderon de Monmouth 43. Er hat 1200 in Monmouth, Monmouthshire, Wales, United Kingdom Lady Maud de Huntington geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Er starb um 1248 im Alter von 67 Jahren in Monmouthshire, Wales, United Kingdom und wurde in Monmouth, Monmouthshire, Wales begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lord John de Monmouth è nato il nel 1182 nel Monmouth, Monmouthshire, Galles, il suo padre, Gilbert fitzBaderon de Monmouth, aveva 43 anni e il suo madre, Mrs Gilbert fitzBaderon de Monmouth, aveva 43 anni. Lui sposato Lady Maud de Huntington nel 1200, nel Monmouth, Monmouthshire, Galles, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì circa 1248, nel Monmouthshire, Galles, Regno Unito, all'età di 67 anni, e fu sepolto a Monmouth, Monmouthshire, Galles.

ja.Monmouth, Monmouthshire, Wales, United K: イギリスウェールズモンモウスシュアイアモンモウス
ja.lifeSummary: Lord John de Monmouthが1182年にウェールズモンモウスシュアイアモンモウスで生まれた時，父Gilbert fitzBaderon de Monmouthは43歳，母Mrs Gilbert fitzBaderon de Monmouthは43歳であった。1200年にイギリスウェールズモンモウスシュアイアモンモウスでLady Maud de Huntingtonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼は約1248年にイギリスウェールズモンモウスシュアイアで67歳で死去し，ウェールズモンモウスシュアイアモンモウスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Lord John de Monmouth(이)가 1182년 웨일스 몬모우스실르 몬모우스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Gilbert fitzBaderon de Monmouth(은)는 43세였고, 그의 어머니 Mrs Gilbert fitzBaderon de Monmouth(은)는 43세였다. 그는 1200년 영국 웨일스 몬모우스실르 몬모우스에서 Lady Maud de Huntington(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1248년 영국 웨일스 몬모우스실르에서 67세의 나이로 사망했으며 웨일스 몬모우스실르 몬모우스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lord John de Monmouth nasceu em 1182, em Monmouth, Monmouthshire, Gales, seu pai, Gilbert fitzBaderon de Monmouth, tinha 43 anos e sua mãe, Mrs Gilbert fitzBaderon de Monmouth, tinha 43 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Maud de Huntington em 1200, em Monmouth, Monmouthshire, Gales, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1248, em Monmouthshire, Gales, United Kingdom, com 67 anos, e foi sepultado em Monmouth, Monmouthshire, Gales.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lord John de Monmouth родился в 1182 г. в местности монмоут, монмоутшир, Уэльс, его отцу по имени Gilbert fitzBaderon de Monmouth было 43 года, а матери, которую звали Mrs Gilbert fitzBaderon de Monmouth, 43. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Maud de Huntington в 1200 г. в местности монмоут, монмоутшир, Уэльс, Великобритания. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Он умер около 1248 г. в местности монмоутшир, Уэльс, Великобритания в возрасте 67 лет и был похоронен в местности монмоут, монмоутшир, Уэльс.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lord John de Monmouth nació en 1182, en Monmouth, Monmouthshire, Gales, su papá, Gilbert fitzBaderon de Monmouth, tenía 43 años y su mamá, Mrs Gilbert fitzBaderon de Monmouth, tenía 43 años. Se casó con Lady Maud de Huntington en 1200, en Monmouth, Monmouthshire, Gales, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Murió aproximadamente 1248, en Monmouthshire, Gales, Reino Unido, a la edad de 67 años, y fue sepultado en Monmouth, Monmouthshire, Gales.
